title: Explain a problem clearly
subtitle: Problem, reason, request.
overview: A clear A2 problem explanation has three parts.
Say what happened, why it matters, and what you need.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Hay un problema con la reserva.
There is a problem with the reservation.
No puedo entrar en la cuenta.
I need help to change it.

items.es: Hay un problema con mi billete.
items.en: There is a problem with my ticket.

items.es: Compré el billete ayer, pero no recibí el email.
items.en: I bought the ticket yesterday, but I did not receive the email.

items.es: No puedo entrar en mi cuenta.
Necesito ayuda para encontrar la reserva.
items.en: I need help to find the reservation.
Can you check my information, please?
